member.name: T:Sandbox.DresserPlus
member.summary: Dresses a Citizen or Human using one of four clothing sources (Manual, LocalUser, OwnerUser, Hybrid). Body attributes (height, age, tint) are synced across the network in real time.

member.name: F:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ClothingSource.Manual
member.summary: Dresses using manually selected clothing.

member.name: F:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ClothingSource.LocalUser
member.summary: Dresses using the local client's avatar. Each client sees their own clothing.

member.name: F:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ClothingSource.OwnerUser
member.summary: Dresses using the avatar of this GameObject's network owner. All clients see that same clothing.

member.name: F:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ClothingSource.Hybrid
member.summary: Dresses using the avatar of this GameObject's network owner with selected categories stripped and manual clothing applied on top. All clients see that same clothing.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.BodyTarget
member.summary: Who we are dressing. This should be the renderer of the body of a Citizen or Human.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.Source
member.summary: Where the clothing should be sourced from.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.RemoveUnownedItems
member.summary: Strips any clothing items that are not owned in the client's Steam Inventory. Disable only if your game handles ownership checks itself.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ApplyHeightScale
member.summary: Whether the height should be scaled or a standard value for all bodies be used. When false, changing the height scale won't have any effect.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ManualHeight
member.summary: Controls the body's height scale.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ManualAge
member.summary: Controls the body's intensity of skin aging. 0 is smooth/young, 1 is wrinkled/aged.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ManualTint
member.summary: Blends the body's skin color along the skin color spectrum.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.Clothing
member.summary: Clothing items to dress the body with.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.WorkshopClothing
member.summary: Workshop clothing package identifiers to fetch and dress the body with.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.StrippedCategories
member.summary: Clothing categories to strip from the owner's avatar before applying manual clothing.

member.name: P:Sandbox.DresserPlus.IsDressing
member.summary: True while is running asynchronously.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.InstallWorkshopClothing(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetches a workshop clothing package by identifier, mounts it, and returns the clothing resource.
member.returns: The clothing resource, or null if the package was not found or invalid.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.GetClothing(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Builds a based on the selected .
member.returns: The built clothing container, or null if the source is not recognized.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.AddManualClothing(Sandbox.ClothingContainer,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds , , and body attributes (, , ) to the given .
member.param: The container to add items and attributes to.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.OnManualChange
member.summary: Called when , , or is changed.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ApplyWhenReady
member.summary: Waits for the network owner to be assigned (if required by the current ), then applies clothing.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ApplyAttributes
member.summary: Applies , , and on the .

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.ApplyButton
member.summary: Button wrapper for .

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.Apply
member.summary: Dresses the using the selected . Cancels any in-progress dressing, fetches the clothing, and applies it asynchronously.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.Apply(System.Collections.Generic.List{Sandbox.ClothingContainer.ClothingEntry})
member.summary: Sets to the given items and applies them to the .

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.Clear
member.summary: Removes all clothing from the , stripping it back to the bare model.

member.name: M:Sandbox.DresserPlus.CancelDressing
member.summary: Cancels any in-progress async dressing and disposes the cancellation token.
